extra.reason: GPU generation via transform feedback: gen.clj VS+GS mirrors seed/splat-record + layer-params + noise; upload-fields! uploads detail/noise/blur/raw/perm textures; TF+geometry-shader compaction captures survivors into a buffer consumed by shader/fs-src-buf (samplerBuffer). Verified vs CPU golden: exact count match (14046, 7945, 48167), aggregates match to float precision, visually identical. check.clj asserts the shader structure.

GPU splat generation done. ~50x faster (3ms vs ~150ms at 14k; 3.2ms at 48k). GPU is now the default path (GA_PAINTER_CPU_GEN falls back to the tested CPU reference). Bottleneck moved to the O(pixels×splats) render (separate bead).
